jsonLd.title: HomeTown is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at HomeTown are looking for an experienced Floor Manager based out of Ghaziabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About HomeTown:
HomeTown is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HomeTown!
